TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_hi, title = hi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/hi} }

S.FORM: hi tyaba inkyasan mu , khmey ci baley yunux mu , cmyax ci ro'iy mu uy, bawi ci nguhuw mu, tipik ci ngowa mu, ana ga mlabuw ci g'nux mu hiya. lokah 'ba mu. khmey ci skutow mu uy, tpik ci puga mu. mtumow biyux mu uy. ruyux ci kakay mu. lalau yaca, kba' cu ci skotung ro mtenah baley Bnrwan qa galan cpung 江明清 (Yawi．Nomin), (Llyung klesan

hi tyaba inkyasan mu , khmey ci baley yunux mu , cmyax ci ro'iy mu uy, bawi ci nguhuw mu, tipik ci ngowa mu, ana ga mlabuw ci g'nux mu hiya. lokah 'ba mu. khmey ci skutow mu uy, tpik ci puga mu. mtumow biyux mu uy. ruyux ci kakay mu. lalau yaca, kba' cu ci skotung ro mtenah baley Bnrwan qa galan cpung 江明清 (Yawi．Nomin), (Llyung klesan
S.PHON: ħi tjaβa inkjas~ɕan mu , kħmej ʦ~ʨi βalej junux mu , ʦ~ʨmjax ʦ~ʨi roʔij mu uj, βawi ʦ~ʨi ŋuħuw mu, tipik ʦ~ʨi ŋowa mu, ana ɣa mlaβuw ʦ~ʨi ɣʔnux mu ħija. lokaħ ʔβa mu. kħmej ʦ~ʨi s~ɕkutow mu uj, tpik ʦ~ʨi puɣa mu. mtumow βijux mu uj. rujux ʦ~ʨi kakaj mu. lalau jaʦ~ʨa, kβaʔ ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨi s~ɕkotuŋ ro mtenaħ βalej βnrwan qa ɣalan ʦ~ʨpuŋ *** (jawi*nomin), (lljuŋ kles~ɕan
